horoscope: The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Aries, and emotions are immediate. Expressing your feelings is a way of nurturing yourself at this time of the lunar month. With today's transits, you might channel your enthusiasm and intensity into a satisfying project. You can feel stronger through your ability to establish your independence, but it’s also a fine time to explore your desires to connect with like-minded people. Instead, this can be a strong time for connecting with your dreams. Your innermost hopes, wishes, and dreams can be a driving force behind many of your actions right now.

The Moon spends the day in your solar twelfth house, dear Taurus, and you’re more likely to prioritize relaxing, renewing, and recharging. Getting some basic structures in place can be key to releasing yourself from old, negative patterns. Seeking out quiet moments can help rejuvenate you emotionally. At the same time, you can be seeking something heady or absorbing, and you gravitate to the right project or pursuit. You have more conviction about your insights or ideas. Something comes in that’s good food for thought, and it might even be purging and healing. You're experiencing clarity and accurate senses today. Work you did in the past can benefit your current career or reputation. You can get a real sense that if you shine some light on areas of your life that you’ve kept hidden or that have left you feeling guilty, you’ll work more wholeheartedly and feel stronger in other areas.

You’re a good mediator, and others could see you as a stabilizing force today, dear Gemini. You’re building stronger bonds and enjoying contributing. Good energy is with you for bringing more structure to your social life and happiness pursuits, even in small ways, and you’ll feel better off for it. You’re also in great shape to do some major planning and thinking ahead, as well as for discovering new layers of a situation. Your perspective is shifting in powerful, positive ways, and you have more interest in sharing your ideas and causes with others.

With today’s Moon transits, you’re paying more attention to your responsibilities, both to yourself and others, dear Cancer. With a practical mindset, you gravitate to projects that truly matter. You’re also putting in the necessary effort to make your life a little more orderly. The motivation to do your best is strong today, and you’re also using your resources intelligently. It’s a good time to develop strategies, make plans, and dig deeply into a matter to find out a whole lot more about it. Financial backing or moral support is more forthcoming for your longer-term goals or career.

The Moon in your solar ninth house all day can be spirited, dear Leo, but you might also benefit from some structured activities. You likely gain more emotional clarity when sharing your thoughts or feelings with others today. In fact, you’re in good shape for gaining new insights into special people in your life. Rewarding experiences can positively impact a relationship or can even bring a new connection into your life. New ideas and expectations can lead you in different and exciting directions, and tackling a pleasantly challenging topic or project can be satisfying.

With the Moon in your solar eighth house all day, dear Virgo, you’re more likely to take things to heart, and a Pluto transit reinforces this theme. You’re making the best of your improved ability to observe and dissect. You have support from work, or your work is pleasantly involving. You gravitate to absorbing or soulful activities, and pursuing work or health goals can be especially satisfying. A personal revelation can spur you into motion, and you’re now ready to tackle a project or take on a new initiative. You might also see a new layer to a problem and feel better off for it. Efforts that involve analysis, research, and investigation are highly favored.

With the Moon in your solar seventh house all day, dear Libra, you’re quick to see the other side of a situation. You might look for ways to balance your life, or you could seek some feedback. While your life seems a little more dependent on others’ schedules and needs temporarily, it’s a good time to recognize your relationship needs. Your connections feel a little more stable or predictable in happy ways. You may feel gently motivated to improve your life, and you might benefit from shared activities. You might also explore more satisfying ways to express yourself uniquely or creatively.

The Moon spends all day in your solar sixth house, dear Scorpio, encouraging you to focus on the little things or the loose ends in your life. Fortunately, it comes naturally to pace yourself today, and your productivity–-and your mood–-benefit. It's a good time to address problems, tidy up, organize, and micromanage. You’re approaching things very maturely and responsibly, and it feels great to be on top of your affairs. You might also feel quite motivated to work hard to boost your family income or comfort now. Your ability to recreate your home living environment stands out. You might enjoy a renewed commitment to living well at home and in your daily routines.

The Moon spends the day in your sector of joy and creativity, dear Sagittarius. While it’s a lighthearted transit, the Moon aligns with Saturn, contributing to a stronger sense and love of structure, order, and self-discipline. Today, you feel good about adding a little more organization to your affairs. You’ll also benefit from working on longer-term projects, especially creative ones. With today's transits, you could get the chance (and confidence) to involve yourself in a creative or exciting project deeply. There can be excellent, although perhaps intense, connections to others through communications.

The Moon spends all day in your solar fourth house, dear Capricorn, and you can benefit from checking in with your deeper needs and feelings or loved ones. You have a stronger need for stability and security today, and nothing would please you more than to know you can count on others. Your more practical mindset can help you find good deals. Look for actions speaking louder than words today when you’re considering the people in your life. You are particularly insightful about your money situation. A practical improvement or item that makes your life better can be satisfying now.

The Moon spends the day in your communication sector, dear Aquarius, stirring your need for light and easygoing exchanges. Still, learning something truly useful or practical can be in pleasant focus. Patience and maturity can pay off now. It’s a fine time to handle matters you put on a shelf or that require a solid, practical, and focused mindset. Helping people out, particularly with advice or information, can be in focus. You can deal with the nitty-gritty today, and you might make some interesting connections as you pursue your goals. You tend to take the lead with your ideas and plans. Fortunately, your personality comes through beautifully in whatever personal interest or project you’re currently involved in.

The Moon spends all day in your resources sector, dear Pisces, which helps to steady your emotions. Consider whether slowing things down to get them right is your best bet with today's transits. You may be keeping to yourself a little more than usual, but it’s only because you are in a serious, productive, and practical frame of mind. It’s a good time to set emotions aside to better tackle practical tasks. Grounding, earthy activities are satisfying. Even so, you could be itching to get to the truth or heart of a matter, and you can do well to make plans or devise strategies today. With money, talents, and valuables, you could find yourself better positioned to manage or work towards reaching your goals.
